title: I never I always brush my teeth.
content:
I never I always brush my teeth.

I'm sure you do every day, too.

But dad doesn't Some people don't understand that some people are really good at doing something every single day.

Is Vincent, like that kind of, or no? .

Vincent is methodical, but hes to his own.

He beats to his own drama.

Like, Vincent goes, like, let's say, on his day up Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Vincent gets up, and he knows he'll but when he goes to sleep at night, he says, okay, tomorrow I'm gonna get up at 10, because I want to hit the thrift stores that are down in Boca on Tuesday, because Tuesday is the day they do. Pickups.

He knows he has a system.

Vincent doesn't blindly just do things.

He makes a plan, and he would stress me out because he makes it by by the skin of his teeth.

But if he says he's going to be there at 5 o'clock, he's there at 5 o'clock.

I don't know how he fucking does it, but he makes himself a plan.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 181 (chunk 181/225)
